description: A stylish, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's eye-catching bead and button embellishment this pair looks great with evening and party wear.  This sandal will perfectly complement ethnic or Western evening dresses.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.UpperSmooth footbed with a weave pattern look, ergonomically curved for absolute comfort and styleThong styled straps in braided cords with bold embellishments in centreHas a toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable outsole with a grooved slight heelReinforced heel cap for heel durabilitySandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
